description:
Create a chemical facility map layer for emergency planning using CAMEO Data Manager. Enter the following three facilities and their chemical inventories:
- Westside Cold Storage (34.0522, -118.2437) storing Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS: 7664-41-7)
- Eastside Water Treatment (34.0953, -118.2801) storing Chlorine (CAS: 7782-50-5)
- Northside Ice & Fuel (34.1490, -118.3490) storing Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS: 7664-41-7)
Generate a KML map file containing only the facilities that store 'Anhydrous Ammonia' and export the results to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ammonia_map.kml.
